name: Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 1 can (28 oz) Italian plum tomatoes, drained
1/2 cup Uncooked elbow macaroni or small shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a 4-quart pot.
2. Add onion, garlic, carrots, celery, and leek to the pot.
3. Sauté until the onion is tender.
4. Add tomatoes with their liquid, breaking up the tomatoes with a fork.
5. Stir in broth, parsley, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat.
7. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
8. Stir in beans and cabbage; let it simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Stir in zucchini and macaroni; simmer uncovered for another 10 minutes.
10. Serve with Parmesan cheese. Makes 6 (2-cup) servings.
